desc: Transfers specific named items within a category from a source .rvt to the current project.
summary: Transfers specific named items within a category from a source .rvt to the current project. For example, transfer only "MEP - Duct" and "MEP - Pipe" filters from the source. Opens source detached via TransferStandardsSourceDocumentManager. Executes via TransferStandardsExecutor.
usecase: User wants to selectively transfer specific filters or templates.
precondition: Active Revit document must be open. Source file and named items must exist.
postcondition: Specified named items transferred from source to target.
